text: The surgeon grasps the needle while setting it down on a flat surface, preparing for its introduction into the surgical field.
The surgeon pulls on the suture to adjust the orientation of the needle within the surgical field.
The surgeon pinches the top of the incision to align the markings, preparing for precise suturing.
The right hand grasps the needle end of the suture, positioned one to two centimeters from the needle, preparing for the next step in the suturing process.
